title: Expose misclassification-analysis payloads through evaluation info surfaces
description:
## Summary
Expose the new misclassification-analysis payload through evaluation info surfaces and API consumers.

## Deliverables
- Include the structured payload in evaluation info responses used by MCP and dashboard consumers.
- Keep the payload first-class rather than burying it inside free-form text.
- Preserve a clear separation between item classifications, evaluation-level flags, and optimization RCA.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: add first-class misclassification_analysis exposure in evaluation info outputs (CLI/MCP-facing) so consumers do not need to parse free-form parameters payloads.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented first-class payload exposure for evaluation info surfaces: Evaluation.get_evaluation_info now returns top-level root_cause and misclassification_analysis fields (extracted from persisted parameters.root_cause). Updated MCP plexus_evaluation_info and plexus_evaluation_run payload builders to consume these first-class fields directly.
